addon.name: [COLOR red]The Red Test Wizard[/COLOR]
addon.provider-name: Slam, Sarge, Funsterbe, BYB, Zaxxon709, [COLOR red]The Red Wizard[/COLOR]

extension.summary: [COLOR red]The Red Test Wizard for Kodi 21 Omega and Kodi 22 Piers[/COLOR]
extension.description: [COLOR red]The Red Wizard test environment for Kodi 21 Omega and Kodi 22 Piers[/COLOR]
extension.disclaimer: [COLOR red]The author of this add-on does not host any content and has no affiliation with the content providers[/COLOR]
extension.news: [COLOR red]2026-03-31 - Clone of plugin.program.theredwizard v4.2.8 - Supports Kodi 21 Omega and Kodi 22 Piers - Disable auto clear packages - Disable notification on first run - The Red Wizard has a new home! Go to https://redwizard.xyz[/COLOR]
